did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article discussing the potential role of artificial intelligence in improving OCT interpretation accuracy. It mentions that deep learning has been applied to OCT in ophthalmology and machine learning has been used in other dermatology studies (citing references 93-95), but it does not report that this specific paper used AI/ML to obtain its own results. The paper itself does not present new experimental data or AI models.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
